technical_details.technical_details:

Authorization endpoint: oauth2/authorize
Token endpoint: oauth2/token
Credentials list: /credentials/list
Credential info: /credentials/info
Sign hash: /signatures/signhash

technical_details.endpoints_available: Not publicly exposed; limited controlled testing only
technical_details.technical_details: No public endpoints; environment inside own VPN. Some wallet scenarios may need app running on certSIGN-controlled phones inside VPN.
technical_details.auth_requirements: External wallet integration would require redefining URLs and importing certificates. Much better if pairing is prepared before event.
technical_details.trust_anchors: Scenario materials and trust/configuration artifacts to be shared later when ready.
technical_details.technical_constraints:
We can prove two full flows of signHash from a wallet centric and an RP-centric perspective (non-wallet CSC client), with an environment derived from the Reference Wallet Implementation (wallet, issuer, verifier, Authentication Server, SCA), an our own RSS. As such, we have a complete solution (from a components/actors perspective), but this solution is not exposed (runs in our sandboxed VPN). We would like to be paired with both a Wallet Solution (to bring it into our environment) and also with another QTSP to test our Wallet Solution.
Evidence will be provided for all the flows and all the calls in all available scenarios.
Environment inside corporate VPN; time-limited feasibility for external integrations.

implementations: Full stack implementation: Wallet, CSC Provider, CSC Client, Verifier and credential issuance/testing endpoints. Provides CSC endpoints for interoperability testing.

technical_details.endpoints_available: Yes – CSC API endpoints provided
technical_details.auth_requirements: client_id=wallet-client ; client_secret=somesecret2 ; redirect_uri=rqes://oauth/callback ; deeplink schemas eudi-openid4vp:// and openid-credential-offer:// . Flexible to change values or create new clients on the spot.

technical_details.endpoints_available: Yes
technical_details.technical_details: CSC base: https://dev.entaksi.eu/tsp/api/v1/ ; OIDC well-known: https://dev.entaksi.eu/auth/realms/edoc/.well-known/openid-configuration ; CSC APIs under /csc/v2 including credentials/list, credentials/info, signatures/signHash, signatures/signDoc, credentials/create, credentials/delete
technical_details.auth_requirements: Can issue one or more wallet client_ids. Redirect URI format for brokered IdP: https://dev.entaksi.eu/auth/realms/edoc/broker/walletX/endpoint . Supports PAR and authorize URL parameter flow.
technical_details.trust_anchors: Needs external IdP endpoints and public keys for broker configuration.
technical_details.technical_constraints: SubjectData currently expects eidas_person_identifier for credential creation where applicable; API-01 should include subject authentication; supports PAR and authorize URL parameter flow.
